profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Griptha Putra Persada Tbk operates a hotel under the Hotel Griptha name in Indonesia. Its hotel facilities include various type of rooms, such as deluxe, business class, and suite; and swimming pool, fitness center, restaurant, and cafe. The company also provides meeting, incentive, conference, and exhibition facilities. PT Griptha Putra Persada Tbk was founded in 2010 and is based in Kudus, Indonesia.
